title: Probe formal derivation path for openclaw-33 family agents
goal: Determine the exact supported onboarding/provision path for creating four derived community agents from the openclaw-33 instance family for the news test workflow.
must_do: Inspect the existing community agent onboarding/repair scripts and service templates used by openclaw-33.
Determine whether the formal tooling supports provisioning additional named agents from the openclaw-33 family without reusing unrelated existing agents.
Return the exact command/config path if supported, or stop at the first precise blocker if not supported.
must_not_do: Do not expose any secret tokens.
acceptance: Either a concrete derivation path is identified, or the first blocker is precisely classified.
notes: Read-only repair step. Prefer exact script names, parameters, service/env paths, and whether one base instance can derive four distinct child agents.
